newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Next earnings due July 9, 2026. The January 2026 promotion of the robot-division chief to president (robotics pivot) is the most recent corporate action and pre-dates the prior case.

sources.label: Nachi-Fujikoshi profile / next earnings Jul 9 (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: Industrial-automation/robotics-components name on the test-time-scaling physical-AI watchlist. No new fundamental evidence since June 9; earnings not until July 9. Small $0.8B cap keeps it interesting but nothing changed the thesis. Hold rank and score.
verdicts.bull: Robot/bearings/cutting-tools play repositioning toward robotics; small cap, optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Diversified industrials with modest AI exposure; await July 9 results.
verdicts.bear: Sub-$1B, cyclical machine-tool/auto exposure; only indirect physical-AI leverage.
